rds.dbproxytargetgroup.ConnectionPoolCon.Description: Settings that control the size and behavior of the connection pool associated with a `DBProxyTargetGroup`.

rds.dbproxytargetgroup.DBClusterIdentifi.Description: One or more DB cluster identifiers.

rds.dbproxytargetgroup.DBInstanceIdentif.Description: One or more DB instance identifiers.

rds.dbproxytargetgroup.DBProxyName.Description: The identifier of the `DBProxy` that is associated with the `DBProxyTargetGroup`.

rds.dbproxytargetgroup.TargetGroupName.Description: The identifier for the target group.  Currently, this property must be set to `default`.
